title: Fern Drops OP Loot
description: Turn ferns into an overpowered loot source for fast and exciting gameplay.
body:
The Fern is OP datapack turns simple ferns into powerful loot sources. Breaking ferns now has a chance to drop overpowered items, rare resources, or enchanted gear, making exploration and biome discovery much more rewarding.

This datapack adds a fun and unexpected twist to survival gameplay while keeping vanilla mechanics intact. It’s perfect for custom challenges, multiplayer servers, and players who want faster progression with a unique concept.

Features

Ferns drop OP items and rare loot

Includes enchanted tools, weapons, and valuable resources

Makes exploration more rewarding

Boosts early-game progression

Compatible with vanilla Minecraft

Works in singleplayer and multiplayer
